summary: Test suite covers main happy-path functionality (basic labels, multiple labels, some glob patterns) but has critical issues: (1) The priority ordering test uses invalid PowerShell hashtable syntax (@{...} as hashtable key), making that test broken. (2) Missing tests for core functions (ConvertGlobToRegex, Test-GlobMatch tested only indirectly). (3) Incomplete assertions—priority test checks only that high-priority label exists, not that low-priority is excluded. (4) Missing edge cases: files matching no rules, path separator handling, case sensitivity, special characters, deeply nested paths, multiple same-priority rules. (5) No test for output order preservation despite implementation maintaining assignment order. The malformed pattern test is vague ('should either skip or throw'). Would catch some regressions but miss behavioral changes and edge case bugs.
